title: CowPack
description: A modpack offering QoL enhancements & improved performance
body:
# CowPack This is a modpack providing QoL features & better performance. Because I only play on servers, I made this modpack completely support multiplayer! # Mods Included
Mods Included (55)
  • AppleSkin
  • Architectury API
  • Auth Me
  • Better Command Block UI
  • Better Ping Display [Fabric]
  • Bobby
  • Caxton
  • Chat Heads
  • Cloth Config API
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
  • Dynamic FPS
  • Entity Culling
  • Fabric API
  • Fabric Language Kotlin
  • Fast IP Ping
  • FerriteCore
  • Folders!
  • Forge Config API Port
  • Freecam
  • ImmediatelyFast
  • Indium
  • Iris Shaders
  • Krypton
  • Language Reload
  • Litematica
  • Lithium
  • MaLiLib
  • Mod Menu
  • ModernFix
  • More Chat History
  • Mouse Tweaks
  • NBT Autocomplete
  • No Chat Reports
  • Not Enough Animations
  • Plasmo Voice
  • Raknetify
  • Remove Reloading Screen
  • ReplayMod
  • Roughly Enough Items (REI)
  • Shulker Box Tooltip
  • Sodium
  • Very Many Players (Fabric)
  • ViaFabricPlus
  • WTHIT
  • WorldEdit
  • XXL Packets
  • Xaero's Minimap
  • Xaero's World Map
  • XaeroPlus
  • YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
  • Zoomify
  • [ETF] Entity Texture Features
  • bad packets
  • kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric
  • oωo (owo-lib)
# Tests It has been tested with a laptop with NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650.
With shaders: ~144 FPS when looking at the void, and ~90 FPS in a normal overworld.
Without shaders: ~200 FPS when looking at the void, and ~160 FPS in a normal overworld.
I might run more tests with different devices.
